zh.lifeSummary: 當Marmaduke Thweng於1310年出生在英國越可爾武坡 爾姆斯利時，他的父親Sir Edmund De Thwenge31歲，母親Isabel Constable26歲。他於1344年與Agnes Northwode在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1369年10月在他的家鄉享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Thweng
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so called in East Yorkshire, named with Old Norse thvengr or Old English thweng ‘narrow strip of land’.
History: Martha Thwing (died 1774) is buried in the King's Chapel Burying Ground in Boston MA.

nameMeanings.name: Marmaduke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain derivation. It is generally held to be an Anglicized form of the Old Irish name Mael-Maedóc ‘devotee of Maedóc’. The name Maedóc was borne by various early Irish saints, most notably a 6th-century abbot of Clonmore and a 7th-century bishop of Ferns. Mael-Maedóc Ó Morgair ( 1095–1148 ) was a reformer of the Church in Ireland and a friend of Bernard of Clairvaux. However, the modern Gaelic form (from c.1200 ) is Maol-Maodhóg (pronounced ‘mul-may-og’), so that the name would have had to have been borrowed into English before this loss of the d. Marmaduke has never been common except in Yorkshire, where for example it was bourne by Marmaduke Huby , abbot of Fountains, ( 1495–1526 ). Its most notable bearer in recent times has been Marmaduke Hussey ( 1923–2006 ), a former chairman of the governors of the BBC.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Marmaduke Thweng was born in 1310, in Upper Helmsley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Edmund De Thwenge, was 31 and his mother, Isabel Constable, was 26. He married Agnes Northwode in 1344, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in October 1369, in his hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marmaduke Thweng est né en 1310, à Upper Helmsley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edmund De Thwenge, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel Constable, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Northwode en 1344, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en octobre 1369, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marmaduke Thweng è nato il nel 1310 nel Upper Helmsley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Edmund De Thwenge, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Constable, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Northwode nel 1344, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel ottobre 1369, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marmaduke Thwengが1310年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウップエル ヘルムスリーで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund De Thwengeは31歳，母Isabel Constableは26歳であった。1344年にイギリスでAgnes Northwodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1369年10月に故郷で59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marmaduke Thweng(이)가 1310년 영국 요르크실르 업퍼 헬슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edmund De Thwenge(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Constable(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1344년 영국에서 Agnes Northwode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1369년 10월 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marmaduke Thweng родился в 1310 г. в местности уппир хелмсли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edmund De Thwenge было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel Constable, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Northwode в 1344 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер октябрь 1369 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.
